description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting a mature man with wavy hair, a mustache, and a goatee. The figure is dressed in a formal jacket, shirt, and bow tie, with detailed folds and buttons visible on the clothing. The bust is mounted on a rectangular pedestal base, which provides stability and elevates the figure. The facial features are finely sculpted, with a solemn expression and closed lips. The back of the head and shoulders are smoothly finished, with the hair rendered in soft, flowing locks. The entire sculpture appears to be made from a single piece of white or light-colored stone or plaster, giving it a uniform matte appearance.
description: A finely detailed bust of a bearded man in formal attire, rendered in white stone or plaster and mounted on a rectangular pedestal. The sculpture features realistic facial details and textured hair.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head with wavy hair and the broad shoulders of the bust, as well as the rectangular pedestal base.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the man's facial features, prominent nose, and the detailed folds of the jacket and bow tie.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the full face, mustache, goatee, and formal attire, with the bow tie and buttons clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the side of the face, ear, and the draped jacket, with the pedestal base visible below.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is plain and featureless.
